name: Star Phoenix Group Ltd
summary: Star Phoenix Group Ltd. explores for, develops, and produces oil and gas in Trinidad and Indonesia. The company holds 23% interest in the Perlak project located in Northern Sumatra. It also provides oilfield services. The company was formerly known as Range Resources Limited and changed its name to Star Phoenix Group Ltd.in March 1984. Star Phoenix Group Ltd. was incorporated in 1982 and is based in Perth, Australia.
